name: Roland Jenseric
bio:
Physical Appearance: Breton male wearing the rare weightless forester's shirt paired with laced leather pants and quilted shoes. Wields a shortsword.
Race: Breton
Personality Keywords: warrior, grieving, isolated, accused, innocent, romantic, broken, fugitive
Role: Roland Jenseric is a warrior who used to live a quiet, lonely existence in the Imperial City's Temple District until he met the love of his life, Relfina. The couple used Roland's remote cabin along the Blue Road for romantic moments away from the city. Tragically, Relfina was recently attacked and killed by a vampire, devastating Roland and causing him to flee to his cabin in isolation. The Order of the Virtuous Blood, a team of vampire hunters, has accused Roland himself of being the vampire responsible for Relfina's death and seeks his execution. He carries food, a random book, the key to his cabin, the key to his Temple District house, and a small amount of gold.
Home Location Information: Originally lived in the Temple District of the Imperial City. Now isolated in his remote cabin along the Blue Road.
Daily Routine: [As a grief-stricken fugitive hiding in his cabin, specific routine unavailable]
Personality - The Grieving Innocent: Roland has been destroyed by the loss of Relfina, the woman who brought him out of his lonely existence and gave his life meaning. Their remote cabin, once a place of romance and happiness, has now become his refuge from the world - and from false accusations. Wrongly accused of being the vampire who killed his beloved, he has isolated himself in grief and desperation, carrying only the essentials and memories of his former life (represented by the keys to both his cabin retreat and his abandoned city home). His isolation speaks to both his overwhelming grief and his need to escape the vampire hunters who have condemned him for a crime he didn't commit.
author: Bethesda
